title: croton calyciglandulosus
intro: Croton calyciglandulosus, also known as the "calyciglandulosus croton" or " croton glanduloso", is a plant species in the genus Croton and family Euphorbiaceae, native to tropical regions of Central and South America. The medicinal properties of Croton calyciglandulosus include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant has been reported to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues, among others. Croton calyciglandulosus is often prepared in herbal remedies, including infusions, decoctions, and ointments, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
